title: Parametric Generalized Adaptive Moment Features (PG-AMF) for Bearing Fault Diagnosis and Machine Health Monitoring
abstract: arXiv:2606.26317v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: Accurate fault diagnosis of rolling element bearings in rotating machinery is considered essential for ensuring industrial safety and enabling predictive maintenance. Conventional statistical feature-based methods rely on predefined descriptors, whose diagnostic sensitivity is constrained by fixed configurations and limited adaptability across varying fault conditions. Although deep learning approaches offer strong representational capacity, their effectiveness is often restricted by high data requirements and reduced interpretability. In this work, a parametric adaptive feature extraction framework is proposed, in which feature characteristics are learned directly from data rather than being manually specified. Multiple complementary representations are extracted from vibration signals, including absolute features capturing signal energy distribution, signed moment features reflecting waveform asymmetry, and AC-coupled moment features

Title: Parametric Generalized Adaptive Moment Features (PG-AMF) for Bearing Fault Diagnosis and Machine Health Monitoring
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26317v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: Accurate fault diagnosis of rolling element bearings in rotating machinery is considered essential for ensuring industrial safety and enabling predictive maintenance. Conventional statistical feature-based methods rely on predefined descriptors, whose diagnostic sensitivity is constrained by fixed configurations and limited adaptability across varying fault conditions. Although deep learning approaches offer strong representational capacity, their effectiveness is often restricted by high data requirements and reduced interpretability. In this work, a parametric adaptive feature extraction framework is proposed, in which feature characteristics are learned directly from data rather than being manually specified. translated_title: 参数化广义自适应矩特征（PG-AMF）用于轴承故障诊断与机器健康监测
translated_abstract: 摘要：旋转机械中滚动轴承的精确故障诊断被认为对确保工业安全和实现预测性维护至关重要。传统的基于统计特征的方法依赖于预定义的描述符，其诊断灵敏度受限于固定配置和在不同故障条件下的有限适应性。尽管深度学习方法提供了强大的表征能力，但其有效性常受限于高数据需求和较低的可解释性。本文提出了一种参数化自适应特征提取框架，其中特征特性直接从数据中学习，而非手动指定。从振动信号中提取了多种互补表示，包括捕捉信号能量分布的绝对特征、反映波形不对称性的有符号矩特征以及交流耦合矩特征。
tldr: 提出了一种参数化自适应特征提取框架，通过直接从数据中学习特征特性，从振动信号中提取绝对、有符号和AC耦合矩特征，克服了传统统计特征适应性差和深度学习可解释性低的缺点，用于轴承故障诊断。
en_tdlr: Proposes a parametric adaptive feature extraction framework that learns feature characteristics directly from data, extracting absolute, signed, and AC-coupled moment features from vibration signals, overcoming the poor adaptability of traditional statistical features and low interpretability of deep learning for bearing fault diagnosis.
